description_long: This is a roughly rectangular, dark stone with a rugged, irregular surface and a somewhat elongated form. The stone appears dense and solid, with a coarse texture and visible pitting and unevenness across its faces. One side features a hand-painted white marking, possibly an inventory or catalog number, suggesting it has been collected or studied. The coloration is predominantly dark gray to black, with subtle variations in shading and some lighter patches. The stone's edges are blunt and not sharply defined, giving it a weathered, natural appearance. Its size and shape suggest it could serve as a small barrier or obstacle in an urban environment, such as a park or garden.
description: A dark, rugged rectangular stone with a coarse, weathered surface and hand-painted white markings on one side.
description_view_0: A narrow, edge-on view showing the stone's pointed, elongated profile and rough surface.
description_view_1: A side view revealing the stone's rectangular shape, coarse texture, and overall length.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, similar to view 0, highlighting the stone's tapering and irregular outline.
description_view_3: A broad side view displaying the hand-painted white marking and the stone's uneven, pitted surface.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or minor barrier along a path
attribute_pattern: No regular pattern; surface is mottled and pitted with some lighter patches and a hand-painted marking.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered, with visible pitting and surface irregularities indicating prolonged exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts moderately with manicured urban features but could blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements.
